productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Stripes Grey Sweaters
description: Composition Grey striped sleeveless sweater made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, ribbed arm holes, neck and hem, and has a brand badge on the left chest Fitting Regular  Wash careHand or machine wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm ironThis striped sweater from indigo nation is a classic piece that every man should have in his wardrobe. Complementing both casual and formal wear aptly, this sweater looks best when worn with basic full sleeve shirts and dark formal trousers, while the cotton knit fabric keeps you warm and cosy this winter.  Model's statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6'3" and shoulders 19"
